ideation: This sequence will depict a gentle, floating motion, suggesting the lightheartedness and airy nature of clouds.  The arms will move in a soft, wave-like pattern, mirroring the way clouds drift in the sky.  I'll use subtle variations in joint angles and wrist positions to create a sense of effortless movement. The lack of elbows in the robot's arm design will require careful choreography to simulate a fluid, natural-looking gesture.  Both arms will participate, moving in a coordinated but not identical fashion.  The sequence will emphasize the soft and yielding nature of clouds, avoiding any sharp or angular movements.

frames.beat: arms drift gently, soft as clouds
arms sway softly, like clouds in the breeze
arms settle back into a gentle, resting state
